importDialog.title: Import from outside Doable
importDialog.description: Bring in an environment from a JSON manifest, Standards Zip, or public GitHub repo.
importDialog.jsonHint: Paste a {format} manifest. Anything that fails schema validation is rejected.
importDialog.zipDropPrompt: Drop a Standards Zip here, or click to browse
importDialog.zipCompatibility: Compatible with Anthropic Skills, Cursor Rules, MCP, and Claude Code plugin layouts.
importDialog.urlHint: Public repos only. The import will tarball the path and decode it as a Standards Zip.
importDialog.trustNote: Imports land as a draft environment in your workspace. They never run code or call external services until you authorise each connector individually.

installDialog.title: Install "{title}"?
installDialog.description: Review what this bundle will add to your workspace.
installDialog.warningBanner: Includes {dangerPart}{warnCount, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} that need your attention.

skills.label: Add {count, plural, one {# skill} other {# skills}} to your AI
skills.detail: Skills are reusable system prompts the AI can invoke automatically.

rules.label: Add {count, plural, one {# rule} other {# rules}} that auto-attach to matching files
rules.detail: Rules are scoped to file globs (e.g. *.tsx). They never run code on their own.

knowledge.label: Add {count, plural, one {# knowledge file} other {# knowledge files}} to your context
knowledge.detail: Knowledge files are read by the AI when relevant — they don't execute or fetch anything.

connectors.label: {count, plural, one {# MCP connector} other {# MCP connectors}} can talk to external services
connectors.detail: You'll be asked to authorise each connector individually after install.

credentials.label: You may be asked to provide credentials (API keys, OAuth)
credentials.detail: Credentials are stored in your workspace — never shared with the publisher.

installDialog.isolationNote: Install creates an isolated copy in your workspace. The original publisher cannot modify it after install.

reportDialog.title: Report this listing
reportDialog.description: Tell us what's wrong with "{title}". Reports are reviewed by moderators.

panel.title: Marketplace
panel.discoverHelpTitle: What's the difference between Discover and Marketplace?
panel.importTitle: Import a bundle from JSON, a Standards Zip, or a public GitHub URL
panel.listOnMarketplaceTitle: Package one of your environments and list it
panel.subtitle: Install AI environments — skills, rules, knowledge, and MCP connectors — created by the community.

empty.title: No listings found
empty.publishHint: Be the first to publish an environment!
